sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91836" key="purrixiako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρριχ-ῐᾰκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91836.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pyrrhic</tr_>, [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον</foreign>] <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:8:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.8</biblScope> </bibl>; [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λέξις</foreign>] Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:1:562" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.562</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
